name: vscode-github-file-puller
description: Fetch one or more specific files from a GitHub repository into a target folder in your workspace. Supports private repositories (token auth), conflict strategies, folder structure preservation, and encoding detection.

commands.title: GitHub: Fetch Selected Files to Workspace

githubPuller.showStatusBar.description: Show a status bar button to open the puller panel.

githubPuller.defaultTargetDir.description: Legacy single default target directory. Automatically synced to the first entry in githubPuller.targetDirs.

githubPuller.conflictResolution.description: File conflict strategy: overwrite, skip, or rename.

githubPuller.preserveStructure.description: Preserve the repository folder structure in the workspace.

githubPuller.baseUrl.description: Base URL for GitHub or GitHub Enterprise (e.g., https://github.example.com).

githubPuller.apiBaseUrl.description: Optional API base URL (e.g., https://github.example.com/api/v3). If empty: uses https://api.github.com when baseUrl is https://github.com; otherwise defaults to baseUrl + /api/v3.

githubPuller.token.description: Fallback token (not recommended; stored in plaintext). Prefer the "GitHub: Set Token (Secret Storage)" command.
